DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL AND FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE ORDERED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO SPECIAL AND FORM INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $975, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL AND FORM INTERROGATORIES, TO COMPEL RESPONSE TO DOCUMENT REQUEST AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS ARE ORDERED ADMITTED.
